programme.title: Time Raiders Ep01
programme.desc: Wu Xie acquires a mysterious silk manuscript, while his Third Uncle uncovers a hidden map. To find the truth behind the manuscript & map, they embark on an expedition.

programme.title: Time Raiders Ep02
programme.desc: Wu Xie acquires a mysterious silk manuscript, while his Third Uncle uncovers a hidden map. To find the truth behind the manuscript & map, they embark on an expedition.

programme.title: Time Raiders Ep03
programme.desc: Wu Xie acquires a mysterious silk manuscript, while his Third Uncle uncovers a hidden map. To find the truth behind the manuscript & map, they embark on an expedition.

programme.title: Time Raiders Ep04
programme.desc: Wu Xie acquires a mysterious silk manuscript, while his Third Uncle uncovers a hidden map. To find the truth behind the manuscript & map, they embark on an expedition.

programme.title: Themis Ep11
programme.desc: High Court acting judge Yin Wai Chi voluntarily steps down to serve in the Juvenile Court to uncover the truth behind a horrifying rooftop murder involving youths.

programme.title: Themis Ep12
programme.desc: High Court acting judge Yin Wai Chi voluntarily steps down to serve in the Juvenile Court to uncover the truth behind a horrifying rooftop murder involving youths.

programme.title: Themis Ep15
programme.desc: High Court acting judge Yin Wai Chi voluntarily steps down to serve in the Juvenile Court to uncover the truth behind a horrifying rooftop murder involving youths.

programme.title: The Imperial Coroner 2 Ep28
programme.desc: In this suspenseful mystery romance, a detective couple unravels the "Blood Jade Case," exposing Nanzhao's invasion & an 18-year-old rebellion.
